## Financial know-how.

[ Track Record ](https://www.alcgroup.ci/en/track-record/)
WAEMU’S FIRST INDEPENDENT BUSINESS BANK
![](https://www.alcgroup.ci/wp-content/uploads/2025/03/ALC_Office_Performance.jpg)
CONTROL
THE COMPLEXITY,
maximize the performance.
Founded in 2006, Africa Link Capital Group (ALC Group) is composed of professionals with a combination of recognized financial and operational expertise, multi-sector experience, and in-depth knowledge of African financial markets.
A PROACTIVE APPROACH
based on several strategic pillars.
EXPANDING
OUR EXPERTISE
supporting you further.
ALC Group is currently organized around two divisions : Corporate & Investment Banking and Securitization.
Over the past several years, ALC Group has diversified its activities by establishing two new entities, ALC Structuration and ALC Titrisation, which together form the Securitization division.
The integrated offering of the Securitization Division provides comprehensive client support, covering every stage from the structuring of the transaction to the management of the FCTC (Fonds Commun de Titrisation de Créances – Mutual Fund for the Securitization of Receivables). The expertise developed within the Corporate & Investment Banking division is a key asset, essential for addressing the complexity of risks associated with various projects, including project finance, bond issues, PPP initiatives, and the financing of working capital and capital expenditures.

tavily.answer:
Africa Link Capital Titrisation's official website is https://www.alcgroup.ci/en. It is a securitization division of ALC Group, focusing on structuring and managing funds.
Africa Link Capital Titrisation is a leading independent asset-backed securitization firm in West Africa. It manages debt-backed funds and offers financial structuring services. The firm is part of Africa Link Capital Group.
Africa Link Capital Titrisation is a financial services firm founded in 2014, specializing in titrisation and structured financing. It operates in Côte d'Ivoire and has completed several securitization deals, including a social bond for the PEPT program. Crunchbase data is not available for this company.
Africa Link Capital Titrisation is a leading independent asset-backed securities firm in West Africa, established in 2012. It focuses on securitization to provide liquidity for SMEs and has issued several securitization deals. The firm is part of the Africa Link Capital Group.
Africa Link Capital Titrisation is a leading firm in West Africa's debt securitization market, managing funds and offering services since 2012. It has recently listed its securities on the BRVM. The firm focuses on structuring and managing debt securitization funds.
